_comment: Default portfolio allocation rules. Copy to {WORKSPACE}/portfolio-rules.json to override. Mutated by iterate_portfolio.py, measured by position_replay.py.

CONVICTION_SCALING._comment: Scale stake by regime conviction for the strategy's preferred regime. effective_stake = base × volume_weight × conviction_factor × risk_multiplier. conviction_factor interpolates between 1.0 (at conviction_floor) and max_boost (at conviction=100). Anti-regime conviction penalizes proportionally.
